user_message: Just came out of territory planning with Contoso Ltd. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-25 13:23 EST
Subject: Follow-up: territory planning Review

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with territory planning. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
Date: 2024-01-19 11:09 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Contoso Ltd territory planning

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about territory planning. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Contoso Ltd: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF39-F trap (Skips threads older than recent (silent dropout)); produces complete Consolidated decision log, cross-thread commitment inventory, action list with thread attribution, M
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF39-F failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF39-F failure mode (Skips threads older than recent (silent dropout))
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct territory planning decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF39-F -- Skips threads older than recent (silent dropout)
